about.title: About
about.aboutThisAppDescription: SparkyFitness is an open-source nutrition, exercise, and health-data tracker that syncs to your own server. This app is the mobile companion for logging meals, workouts, and measurements on the go.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.hapticFeedbackDescription: Light vibrations for timers and confirmations.
appSettings.cameraShutterDescription: Play a sound when capturing photos.

calorieSettings.title: Calorie Settings
calorieSettings.calorieModeDescription: Controls how your daily calorie goal adjusts based on activity.
calorieSettings.exerciseCaloriesAppliedDescription: How much of your exercise calories are added back to your daily goal.
calorieSettings.activityLevelBaselineDescription: Used as a baseline for TDEE.
calorieSettings.activityLevelFallbackDescription: Acts as a fallback until you have enough tracking data.
calorieSettings.allowNegativeAdjustmentDescription: Lower your daily goal when you burn less than expected.
calorieSettings.includeRestingCaloriesDescription: Include your baseline energy (BMR) in net calculations.
calorieSettings.remainingNoteFixed: Activity does not change your budget

foodPhotoEstimateReview.toastInvalidOptionalNutrientsMessage: All nutrition values must be non-negative numbers.

foodPhotoImprove.title: Improve estimate
foodPhotoImprove.formHint: Add anything the photo might not make obvious.
foodPhotoImprove.descriptionHint: Include oils, butter, cream, sauces, toppings, sides, or restaurant names.
foodPhotoImprove.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. salmon with lemon dill cream sauce
foodPhotoImprove.invalidWeightMessage: Total weight must be a positive number.
foodPhotoImprove.couldNotReadPhotoMessage: Please retake the photo and try again.

foodPhotoIntro.title: Estimate nutrition from a photo
foodPhotoIntro.subtitle: Turn a meal photo into an editable nutrition estimate.
foodPhotoIntro.weightBulletTitle: Add weight when you know it
foodPhotoIntro.weightBulletDescription: A total meal weight helps with portions, calories, and macros.
foodPhotoIntro.descriptionBulletDescription: Mention sauces, oils, toppings, restaurant names, or anything hidden.
foodPhotoIntro.reviewBulletDescription: Photo estimates are a starting point. You'll be able to edit everything before it's logged.

foodSettings.showNetCarbsDescription: When enabled, carbohydrate summaries display net carbs (total carbs − fiber), and a Total Carbs row is added in nutrient breakdowns.

foodSettings.adjustOpenFoodFactsDescription: Open Food Facts uses values per 100g. This converts them to the product's serving size.

settings.title: Settings
settings.diagnosticReportDescription: Exports a local diagnostic report (app version, sync status, logs). No personal health or food data is included. Nothing is sent automatically.

sync.title: Health Data Sync
sync.syncRangeDescription: Controls how much data will be included in the next sync
sync.largeTimeRangeWarning: Large time ranges may take a while.
sync.syncNowDescription: Send your health data to your server
sync.healthConnectUnavailable: Health Connect is not available. Please make sure it is installed and enabled.
sync.healthKitUnavailable: Health data (HealthKit) is not available. Please enable Health access in the iOS Health app.
sync.notMedicalAdviceText: Consult a healthcare professional for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
sync.healthDataReportDescription: Export anonymized health data for bug reports
sync.healthDataReportNote: Reads the last 4 hours of data from Health Connect for troubleshooting. Values are rounded for privacy. Nothing is sent automatically.
sync.alertPermissionRequiredMessage: Background access permission is required for background sync. Please grant the permission in Health Connect settings.
sync.alertPermissionErrorMessage: Failed to request background access permission: ${errorMessage}
sync.alertPermissionsRequiredMessage: Some permissions were not granted. Please enable all required health permissions in the ${healthSettingsName} to sync all data.
sync.alertAllPermissionsErrorMessage: An error occurred while requesting health permissions: ${errorMessage}
sync.alertReportErrorMessage: Failed to generate health data report: ${errorMessage}

whatsNew.photoHeadline: Snap a meal, log the macros

healthDataSync.title: Health Data to Sync
healthDataSync.platformSummaryIos: Reads selected data from Apple Health and syncs it to your self-hosted server.
healthDataSync.platformSummaryAndroid: Reads selected data from Health Connect and syncs it to your self-hosted server.
healthDataSync.platformDetailIos:
SparkyFitness reads the health data you select below using Apple Health (HealthKit). If sync is enabled, data is synchronized only between your device and your self-hosted SparkyFitness server (manual or background).

Manage or remove access in Settings → Health → Data Access & Devices → SparkyFitnessMobile
healthDataSync.platformDetailAndroid: SparkyFitness reads the health data you select below using Health Connect. If sync is enabled, data is synchronized only between your device and your self-hosted SparkyFitness server (manual or background).
healthDataSync.notMedicalAdviceSuffix: Consult a healthcare professional for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
healthDataSync.batteryWarning: Enabling many health metrics may increase battery usage. Each enabled metric allows the app to wake in the background when new data is available.

hydrationGauge.configureContainerHint:
Configure water container on server to
enable quick add/remove buttons

privacyPolicyModal.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyModal.noDataCollection: This app does not collect, store, or sell your personal data.
privacyPolicyModal.healthkitDataNotice: All HealthKit data stays on your device and is transmitted only to your own server.
privacyPolicyModal.learnMoreLink: Learn more in our Privacy Policy.

syncFrequency.title: Background Sync
syncFrequency.iosDescription: When enabled, the app will update in the background when your phone allows it. Manually syncing will always update right away.

syncOnOpen.title: Sync on Open
syncOnOpen.description: When enabled, health data will sync automatically when you open the app.
